claim: A cafe called Aurora on Rua da Prata in Lisbon sold exactly 212 croissants last Tuesday.
Maria Gonzalez of Toledo, Ohio drives a blue 2011 Honda Civic.
The startup Tessellate Labs raised a seed round in Tallinn in 2017.
There are exactly 4,192 red-brick houses in the town of Alnwick.
Dr. Ravi Menon gave a private lecture on entropy in Pune in March 2019.
The 14th customer at the Shibuya Starbucks yesterday ordered a caramel macchiato.
A dog named Biscuit in Nagpur learned to open the refrigerator in 2018.
The novelist J. P. Halloran wrote most of his third book in a cabin in Vermont.

A meteorite the size of a marble landed in a field near Ust-Kamenogorsk on Sunday.
The community choir of Ballymena rehearsed for three hours on the first Monday of last month.
A software engineer named Priya in Bangalore fixed 37 bugs during last week's sprint.
